german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant share of positions remains accessible without German proficiency, highlighting a notable skill gap.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in the market.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Workforce
seniority.subtitle: Over half of the positions are held by senior professionals, indicating a senior-heavy market.

work_mode.title: Flexibility in Work Modes Remains Uncertain
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles lack clear remote or hybrid expectations.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with remote options remaining limited.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Over half of roles demand AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
